name: Mariner
description: Your town grew up close to the water, and you were a small fishing community that provided fish supplies to some of the larger cities. You have gain a lot of strength from working with aquatic life and also have heard some fascinating stories from the merchants who came to trade.

feats.name: Large Catch
feats.description: When taking the **Grapple** action, you may grapple up to a size larger than you.

_review: attribute_bonus was "+1 Body" — mapped to brawn; verify Brawn vs Finesse
